name: Supabase
desc: Hosted Postgres database with authentication, instant APIs, edge functions, and real-time subscriptions.

name: DigitalOcean
desc: Build and deploy 3 static websites for free on App Platform. Scale to virtual machines and managed Kubernetes.

name: Railway
desc: Deploy backend applications, databases, and services. Trial credits apply upon registration.

name: Clerk
desc: Complete user management, sign-up, sign-in, and multi-tenant auth UI components for React and Next.js.

name: Neon Postgres
desc: Serverless Postgres with instant branching, autoscaling, 0.5 GiB storage, and shared compute limits.

name: Resend
desc: Modern email service for developers. Send transactional emails with 100 emails/day limit on free tier.

name: DeepInfra
desc: Inexpensive serverless API endpoints for open-source LLMs and embeddings. Trial credits apply to new users.

name: Together AI
desc: High-speed inference API for open-source models. New accounts receive $25 trial credit.

name: Retool
desc: Drag-and-drop UI builder connected directly to your databases and APIs, free for small internal teams.

name: Deepgram
desc: High-fidelity, lightning-fast Speech-to-Text and Text-to-Speech API. New signups receive $200 in free trial credits.

name: Sentry
desc: Application monitoring and error tracking. The free developer tier supports up to 5,000 monthly errors and basic analytics.

name: Instatus
desc: Status page builder. Get unlimited status pages, subscribers, and team members for free (hosted on instatus.com subpath).

name: Mux
desc: High-performance API for video streaming, encoding, and analytics. Startups program offers at least $500 in usage credits.

name: Algolia
desc: Hosted search-as-a-service engine API. Eligible early-stage startups receive $10,000 in usage credits for their first 12 months.

name: Doppler
desc: Developer-first environment variable and secrets manager. Free forever for up to 3 users with full API and CLI access.

name: Microsoft Founders Hub
desc: Get up to $150k in Azure cloud credits, free access to GitHub Enterprise, Visual Studio, and 1:1 technical advice. No funding required.

name: Notion
desc: All-in-one workspace for notes, docs, wikis, and project management. Startups get up to 6 months of Notion Business with AI for free.

name: MongoDB Atlas
desc: Fully managed cloud NoSQL database service. Eligible early-stage startups receive up to $5,000 in MongoDB Atlas usage credits.
